name: The Quantum Airlock
description: Open an airlock stuck in quantum superposition by forcing state collapse.

flaws.name: Trigger Emergency Siren
flaws.flavor_text: Activate the red emergency siren, which is hardwired to initiate oxygen venting.

flaws.name: Blind Observer Sensor
flaws.flavor_text: Blind the observer-sensor. It is completely blind to red spectrum light from the siren.

flaws.name: Collapse Superposition
flaws.flavor_text: With the observer blinded and oxygen vented, force the door to collapse into a physical open state.
